ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., delay, time) */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the parameter */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the parameter is used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_parameters_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES parameter_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_parameters_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., speaker, microphone) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the device */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the device */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the device entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the device entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the device entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the device entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of parameter */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the parameter type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., ns, ms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the audio parameter */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "date_effective" TEXT /* Date when the version became effective */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES audio_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., engineer, manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the parameter */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_access_logs_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES audio_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parameter_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first parameter in the relationship */,
  "parameter_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second parameter in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., dependent, independent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_relationships_parameter_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id_1") REFERENCES audio_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_relationships_parameter_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id_2") REFERENCES audio_parameters ("parameter_id")
)
